config.name: Rahul Ravula
config.title: Cloud DevOps Engineer
config.bio:
I have DevOps experience with strong skills in cloud infrastructure, CI/CD automation, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Linux, Git, monitoring, scripting, and production support.
I have worked on building reliable deployment pipelines, automating infrastructure, managing cloud environments, troubleshooting issues, and improving release speed and system stability.
My achievements include reducing manual deployment effort, improving environment consistency, strengthening monitoring visibility, and supporting faster and safer application delivery.
